name: Barbecued Ribs
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Pork ribs, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ribs in a shallow roasting pan with the meaty side up.
2. On each rib piece, place a slice of unpeeled lemon and a thin slice of onion.
3. Roast in a very hot oven (450°F) for 30 minutes.
4. Combine remaining ingredients (water, chili powder, Tabasco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, salt) in a bowl. Bring to a boil and pour over the ribs.
5. Continue baking in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 2 hours, basting with the sauce every 15 minutes.
